event: Peoria City defeated Minneapolis City SC 4–0 in the USL League Two Central Conference semifinal, advancing to the Conference Final on July 24 vs. Flint City Bucks.
Minneapolis City SC were eliminated from the USL League Two playoffs, losing 0–4 to Peoria City in the Central Conference semifinal.
Flint City Bucks are confirmed as the July 24 home host for the USL League Two Central Conference Final vs. Peoria City at Atwood Stadium.
Vermont Green FC are confirmed for the USL League Two Eastern Conference Final on July 24 vs. Asheville City SC at PEG Energy Stadium in Laredo, TX.
Asheville City SC are confirmed for the USL League Two Eastern Conference Final on July 24 vs. Vermont Green FC at PEG Energy Stadium in Laredo, TX.
Ballard FC confirmed for USL League Two Western Conference Final on July 24 vs. Ventura County Fusion at Atwood Stadium in Flint, MI.
Ventura County Fusion confirmed for USL League Two Western Conference Final on July 24 vs. Ballard FC at Atwood Stadium in Flint, MI.
Laredo Heat SC confirmed as home host for Southern Conference Final on July 24 vs. Fort Lauderdale United FC at PEG Energy Stadium.
Fort Lauderdale United FC confirmed for USL League Two Southern Conference Final on July 24 vs. Laredo Heat SC in Laredo, TX.
NY Renegades FC advanced to the UPSL National Quarterfinals, scheduled for July 25–26; a win earns direct entry into the 2027 US Open Cup Tournament Proper.
Miami United FC advanced to the UPSL National Quarterfinals, with the champion earning direct entry into the 2027 US Open Cup Tournament Proper.
West Texas Rush advanced to the UPSL National Quarterfinals; faces Central Kansas United on July 25 in El Paso.
Cape Coral City FC announced as a new UPSL club preparing for an inaugural season beginning in late August 2026, targeting a 30-player roster.
Cape Coral City FC founded by community members to address lack of adult soccer club infrastructure in Cape Coral, FL — club in pre-launch phase.
Athletic Club Boise lead USL League One in total home attendance with 43,248 cumulative and a single-match high of 7,227 vs. Chattanooga Red Wolves SC on May 2.
Corpus Christi FC had gone winless in all 10 of their USL League One matches through late May, the longest winless run in the division.
Fort Wayne FC held the longest active unbeaten run in USL League One at 7 games (from April 11 onward) through late May standings.
Louisville City FC formally applied to join USL Premier at its 2028 launch; application is under review by the league.
Pittsburgh Riverhounds SC identified as actively building a new stadium as part of positioning for USL Premier entry at the 2028 launch.
Sacramento Republic FC identified as actively building a new stadium as part of positioning for USL Premier entry at the 2028 launch.
Detroit City FC identified as actively building a new stadium as part of positioning for USL Premier entry at the 2028 launch.
